color_usage_rules.accent_priority: Red is the dominant visual accent across the interface
contrast_balance: Use red frequently but keep backgrounds neutral (black/gray)
Avoid over-saturation by spacing red elements across layout
Pair red with white text for strong readability

text_effects: High-contrast hierarchy between numeric data and labels
Highlight key numbers or keywords using red accent
Tight line-height for multi-line card descriptions
Vertical stacking for feature lists with icon-text alignment

geometry: Large radius rounded corners (24px - 32px) for main containers
Medium radius rounded corners (12px - 16px) for inner elements/buttons
textures: Low-intensity drop shadows for elevated states
Smooth Gaussian blur for background transitions
motifs: Floating red badges/tags in card corners
Iconography-led feature grids with red highlights
Contextual image masking within rounded containers
Subtle red glow or gradient accents for emphasis

compositional_rules.spacing: Variable density: High-density info-tiles mixed with spacious hero cards
compositional_rules.depth: Flat design with 2.5D layering via color contrast and subtle borders
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Size-based priority with red accent guiding user attention
compositional_rules.alignment: Strictly centered for pricing and call-to-action; left-aligned for content feeds
